title: Coverage, Thresholds, and Meaningful Evidence · Gate Lens: Exclusions
summary: Set coverage policy that exposes risk without encouraging empty tests. Planned artifact: Add and verify the gates exclusions increment in a changed-code coverage and exception policy. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Exclude generated or unreachable code with reviewed narrow rules.
Choose global, package, and changed-code thresholds from risk and baseline.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.

steps.title: Build Exclusions evidence

  failure: [replace with the rejected condition]
